requestSummary: Fix 4 critical homepage visual issues: carousel not displaying, textured headings not visible, background texture missing, gallery needs expansion. Plus Keystatic Git state sync issue.

tasks: Analyze previous implementation failure (app/page.tsx vs app/[slug]/page.tsx routing issue)
Validate that all required images exist in public/images/summer-program-and-general/
Confirm visual design intent from bearlakecamp.com reference
Define success metrics for deployment verification
specialists.output: Position memo on customer impact and implementation priority

tasks: Review bearlakecamp.com reference site for textured heading effect
Define opacity levels for bg-textured that balance visibility with readability
Specify carousel height constraints for optimal hero section
Validate gallery layout (6+ images) responsiveness
specialists.output: Position memo on visual design requirements and accessibility

tasks: Architect solution for app/page.tsx component integration
Validate HeroCarousel height constraint approach (explicit height vs flex)
Review CSS .text-textured gradient for browser compatibility
Assess Keystatic Git state sync issue (REQ-FIX-004)
specialists.output: Position memo on technical approach and architecture

tasks: Write failing tests for app/page.tsx HeroCarousel rendering
Write failing tests for TexturedHeading component usage
Write failing tests for bg-textured class application
Extend smoke-test.sh with visual element assertions (REQ-FIX-005)
Implement HeroCarousel in app/page.tsx
Implement TexturedHeading usage in app/page.tsx
Add bg-textured classes to gallery and CTA sections
Update index.mdoc with heroImages array and expanded galleryImages
Adjust CSS opacity for .bg-textured visibility
Review app/page.tsx for React best practices
Validate CSS changes don't introduce accessibility issues
Check index.mdoc YAML structure correctness
Verify no regressions in existing homepage functionality

phases.description: PM, UX, and PE analyze root causes and define approach
Test-writer creates failing tests for all 5 REQ-FIX items
SDE-III implements fixes to pass tests
Release manager commits, monitors Vercel deployment, runs smoke tests

successCriteria.visualComponents: HeroCarousel displays 5 images, TexturedHeading shows gradient, bg-textured visible
successCriteria.smokeTests: All smoke tests pass on prelaunch.bearlakecamp.com

constraints.existingComponents: Do NOT modify HeroCarousel, TexturedHeading, Gallery components
constraints.cssOnly: Texture effects use CSS only (no images)
constraints.deployment: Vercel auto-deploys on push to main
